children.heading: Citizens separated from employment with Panama Canal Company or Canal Zone Government
children.label: a Citizens separated from employment with Panama Canal Company or Canal Zone Government

children.text: who, on , was an employee of the Panama Canal Company or the Canal Zone Government;March 31, 1979
who separates or is scheduled to separate on or after such date for any reason other than misconduct or delinquency; and
who is not placed in another appropriate position in the Government of the United States in the Republic of Panama;

children.heading: Citizens eliminated from employment with Executive agency or Canal Zone Government as a result of implementation of Panama Canal Treaty of 1977
children.label: b Citizens eliminated from employment with Executive agency or Canal Zone Government as a result of implementation of Panama Canal Treaty of 1977

children.text: who, on , was employed in the Canal Zone as an employee of an Executive agency (other than the Panama Canal Company or the Canal Zone Government) or the Smithsonian Institution;March 31, 1979
whose position is eliminated as the result of the implementation of any provision of the Panama Canal Treaty of 1977 and related agreements; and
who is not appointed to another appropriate position in the Government of the United States in the Republic of Panama;

children.heading: Establishment and administration of program by Office of Personnel Management
children.label: c Establishment and administration of program by Office of Personnel Management
children.text: The Office of Personnel Management shall establish and administer a Government-wide placement program for all eligible employees who request appointment to positions under this section.

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: d Effective date
children.text: The provisions of this section shall take effect on .September 27, 1979
